name: azadirachta indica
title: azadirachta indica benefits
description: Azadirachta indica treats typhoid by exhibiting anti-bacterial and anti-inflammatory properties, which help to combat the Salmonella Typhi bacteria that cause this disease. This benefit is important because typhoid fever can be fatal if not treated promptly, and it can also lead to long-term complications such as intestinal perforation and kidney damage, as seen in cases where patients are not treated with antibiotics.
